name: YAOC2 Brain (OpenClaw)
description: Main brain workflow. Fork of n8n-claw (freddy-schuetz). Receives user messages, reasons over intent, builds ProposedAction objects, and sends them to the YAOC2 policy gateway. Does NOT call CTI services directly.

nodes.name: Telegram Trigger
nodes.notes: User-facing front-end. Replace or supplement with Discord, Web Chat, or API Webhook as needed.

nodes.name: Load Memory (Postgres)
nodes.notes: Load conversation history and project memory for this user/session from the brain Postgres DB.

nodes.name: LLM Reasoning
nodes.notes: Main reasoning step. Given user message + memory + available skills, decide what action(s) to take. Must NOT produce raw CTI API calls. Must produce structured intent.

nodes.name: Build ProposedAction (Code)
nodes.notes: Translate LLM output into a valid ProposedAction JSON object. Validate required fields. Assign risk level based on action type and mode.

nodes.name: Call Gateway (HTTP Request)
nodes.notes: POST ProposedAction to the YAOC2 policy gateway webhook. Include GATEWAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET in Authorization header.

nodes.name: Handle Gateway Response (Code)
nodes.notes: Parse final_status and result_summary from gateway response. Format user-friendly reply.

nodes.name: Save Memory (Postgres)
nodes.notes: Persist updated conversation history and any new project memory entries.

nodes.name: Reply to User (Telegram)
nodes.notes: Send formatted reply back to the user.

TODO: Wire actual n8n-claw (freddy) workflows as sub-workflows for skills (web search, reminders, briefings).
Replace placeholder node types with actual n8n node IDs and parameters.
